name: @atomicmemory/langgraph
description: AtomicMemory adapter for LangGraph JS - state-graph node factories around an injected MemoryClient.

scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "const v=require('./package.json').dependencies['@atomicmemory/sdk'];if(v.startsWith('file:')||v.startsWith('link:')||v.startsWith('workspace:')){console.error('refusing to publish: @atomicmemory/sdk is '+v+'. Publish the SDK first, then pin to a registry version here.');process.exit(1)}"
